title: [Seq] Add clock gate conversion to extern module
body: Add the `ExternalizeClockGate` pass which converts all `seq.clock_gate` ops in a design into instances of a `hw.module.extern`. The name and ports of the extern module can be configured through pass options. In case the module has no test enable port, the conversion adds a `comb.or` to fold the enable and test enable operands of the `seq.clock_gate` into a single enable port.
